_README: TEMPLATE: copy to config.<client>-<market>.json and fill every <...>. Client configs are local-only (gitignored). Contract for the amazon-sb-video-briefs skill; see skills/amazon-sb-video-briefs/SKILL.md.

client.name: <CLIENT>
client.language: <language of ALL on-screen text and VO>

economics.break_even_acos: <number, decimal e.g. 0.32; mark ASSUMED if not confirmed>

product_facts._comment: Only facts from label/PDP/operator. The script never claims anything not in this block or the live listing. For supplements/cosmetics fill the compliance block too.
key_facts: <fact the video may show or say>
forbidden_terms: <terms that must never appear on screen, e.g. branded raw materials with visibility bans>

compliance.notes: <client-specific claim rules, e.g. authorized claim wordings>

brand_kit.logo_rules: <placement/clear-space rules or path to brand doc>

footage.existing_creatives_location: <optional: current SB video / listing videos for reference>

delivery.drive_brief_folder: <Drive folder (name or ID) where the briefing Google Doc is created, e.g. the client's Ads/Creative folder>
delivery.drive_video_folder: <Drive folder where finished cuts are uploaded>

testing.asin_cvr_baseline: <Business Report CVR for target ASIN, same window>
